scripts.dev: node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev --prefix server" "node scripts/wait-api-then-vite.mjs"
scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.start:railway: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.electron:dev: node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && npm run electron:compile && concurrently -k -n api,web,electron -c green,blue,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "node scripts/wait-api-then-vite.mjs" "wait-on http://localhost:5173/play.html && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder
scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android
